chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1016 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.4736/2024 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.4737/2024 (C/A) 25.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- A Statement has been filed by Counsel for respondent No.4 along a photo stat copy of bank’s deposit slip showing that the amount of petitioner’s remaining gratuity i.e. Rs.3,09,000/- has been deposited in his account No.01322024052000 on 24.09.2024, which the Counsel for petitioner affirms. As the order dated 24.09.2024 has been complied with, the original cheque of Rs.3,09,000/- submitted by Counsel for respondent No.4 has been returned to him. Since the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, the listed applications stand disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
